---
title: Inter-contract calls
description: Call another deployed contract while respecting transaction permissions.
---

## Inter-contract calls and permissions

[Open in Playground](https://playground.xelis.io/?%2BIHU2NCB7CiAgICByZXF1aXJlKGlzX2NvbnRyYWN0X2NhbGxhYmxlKHRhcmdldF9oYXNoLCBlbnRyeV9pZCksICJ0eCBwZXJtaXNzaW9uIGJsb2NrcyBjYWxsIikKCiAgICBsZXQgdGFyZ2V0OiBDb250cmFjdCA9IENvbnRyYWN0OjpuZXcodGFyZ2V0X2hhc2gpLmV4cGVjdCgidGFyZ2V0IGNvbnRyYWN0IG5vdCBmb3VuZCIpCiAgICBsZXQgZGVwb3NpdHM6IG1hcDxIYXNoLCB1NjQ%%2BIHU2NCB7CiAgICBsZXQgYXNzZXQ6IEhhc2ggPSBnZXRfeGVsaXNfYXNzZXQoKQogICAgcmVxdWlyZShnZXRfYmFsYW5jZV9mb3JfYXNzZXQoYXNzZXQpLnVud3JhcF9vcigwKSA%%2BID0ge30KICAgIGRlcG9zaXRzLmluc2VydChhc3NldCwgYW1vdW50KQogICAgdGFyZ2V0LmNhbGwoZW50cnlfaWQsIGFyZ3MsIGRlcG9zaXRzKQoKICAgIGZpcmVfcnBjX2V2ZW50KDgxLCBDb250cmFjdERlcG9zaXRDYWxsUnBjRXZlbnQgewogICAgICAgIHRhcmdldF9oYXNoLAogICAgICAgIGVudHJ5X2lkLAogICAgICAgIGFtb3VudAogICAgfSkKICAgIHJldHVybiAwCn0%3D)

Inter-contract calls are denied by default unless the transaction grants permission. Check the active permission before calling.

```rust filename="contract_caller.slx" copy
struct ContractCallRpcEvent {
    target_hash: Hash,
    entry_id: u16,
    args: any[]
}

struct ContractDepositCallRpcEvent {
    target_hash: Hash,
    entry_id: u16,
    amount: u64
}

entry call_entry(target_hash: Hash, entry_id: u16, args: any[]) -> u64 {
    require(is_contract_callable(target_hash, entry_id), "tx permission blocks call")

    let target: Contract = Contract::new(target_hash).expect("target contract not found")
    let deposits: map<Hash, u64> = {}
    target.call(entry_id, args, deposits)

    fire_rpc_event(80, ContractCallRpcEvent {
        target_hash,
        entry_id,
        args
    })
    return 0
}

entry call_with_xel(target_hash: Hash, entry_id: u16, args: any[], amount: u64) -> u64 {
    let asset: Hash = get_xelis_asset()
    require(get_balance_for_asset(asset).unwrap_or(0) >= amount, "contract lacks funds")
    require(is_contract_callable(target_hash, entry_id), "tx permission blocks call")

    let target: Contract = Contract::new(target_hash).expect("target contract not found")
    let deposits: map<Hash, u64> = {}
    deposits.insert(asset, amount)
    target.call(entry_id, args, deposits)

    fire_rpc_event(81, ContractDepositCallRpcEvent {
        target_hash,
        entry_id,
        amount
    })
    return 0
}
```

Invoke this contract with a wallet RPC `permission` value such as `"all"` or a specific allowlist. See [Permissions](/features/smart-contracts/permissions) for the JSON shape.
